experience.description: Led frontend architecture for a SaaS platform serving 200K+ users. Reduced bundle size by 40% and improved Core Web Vitals scores to 95+.
Built and maintained 12+ client projects from ideation to deployment. Introduced CI/CD pipeline reducing deployment time by 60%.
Developed responsive web applications and contributed to an internal component library used across 8 product teams.

education.description: Specialization in Human-Computer Interaction and Distributed Systems. Published research on Progressive Web App performance optimization.
Dean's List all semesters. Led the Web Development Club and organized the annual hackathon with 500+ participants.
